name: Thunderballmon

signature_move.name: Thunderball
signature_move.description: Fires spheres of electricity that can be as powerful as one billion volts.

description: Also known as the " Digimon Dynamo ", it is a Mutation Digimon that is conjectured to be a member of the Mamemon-species . Its tiny body has the properties of a magnet, and is always clad in electricity and discharging lightning. It fires spheres of discharged electricity as much as 10 MV at opponents who are coming to attack it ( Thunder Ball ).
